ExportQuery:
WITH THIS AS(
SELECT
   uniquePersonKey
  ,beneficiaryID  
  ,date_format(startDate, 'MM/dd/yyyy') as startDate
  ,date_format(endDate, 'MM/dd/yyyy') as endDate
  ,named_struct(
          'id', ProviderID
          ,'NPI', ProviderNPI
          ,'TIN', ProviderTIN
      ) as PCPProvider
  ,named_struct(
          'id', BillingProviderID
          ,'NPI', BillingNPI
          ,'TIN', BillingTIN
      ) as billingProvider
  ,array(
      AltPCPReporting1,AltPCPReporting2,AltPCPReporting3,AltPCPReporting4,AltPCPReporting5,AltPCPReporting6,AltPCPReporting7,AltPCPReporting8,AltPCPReporting9,AltPCPReporting10
  ) as altPCPReporting
FROM QueryResult WHERE FileLayoutDescription = 'CHCPCP' and startDate < endDate 
)
SELECT * 
FROM THIS
